scripts.bridge:fmt: cargo fmt --manifest-path bridge/Cargo.toml --check && cargo fmt --manifest-path vendor/herdr-compat/Cargo.toml --check
scripts.bridge:test: cargo test --manifest-path vendor/herdr-compat/Cargo.toml && cargo test --manifest-path bridge/Cargo.toml --bin herdr-web-bridge
scripts.android:sync: npm run build:web && cap sync android
scripts.android:build:debug: npm run android:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run bridge:build
scripts.test: npm run test:web && npm run bridge:test
scripts.lint: npm run lint:web && npm run bridge:fmt
scripts.check: npm run vendor:check && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
